name: Caesar Potatoes
recipeIngredient: Envelope Good Seasons Gourmet Caesar, OR Italian Salad Dressing Mix
1 1/2 pounds red potatoes, cut into chunks
1 medium red or green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare salad dressing mix in cruet or small bowl as directed on envelope, using vinegar and oil (omit water).
2. Toss remaining ingredients with dressing mixture.
3. Spoon contents evenly onto a double layer of heavy-duty aluminum foil; close foil to form tightly-sealed pouch.
4. Place pouch on greased grill over medium coals.
5. Grill 30-35 minutes or until potatoes are tender, turning and shaking halfway through grilling time. Makes 4-6 servings.
- Oven alternative: Prepare as directed except for grilling. Spoon contents into a 15 X 10 X 1-inch baking pan lined with foil. Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
